moments.title: Wireless Festival Takes Over London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival kicks off today, July 3rd, bringing a massive lineup of hip-hop, R&B, and grime artists to Finsbury Park, London, for a weekend of live music.

angles.name: Live from Finsbury Park
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is officially underway! Who are you buzzing to see on stage in Finsbury Park this weekend?

angles.name: Weekend Vibe
angles.copy: The biggest names in rap, R&B, and grime are descending on London. Get ready for a huge weekend at Wireless!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships conclude next weekend, July 11-12, with the Men's and Women's Singles Finals at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Road to the Finals
angles.copy: Centre Court awaits! The Wimbledon finals are just over a week away. Who's making it to the biggest match in tennis?

angles.name: Champagne & Strawberries
angles.copy: Get your Pimm's and strawberries ready! Wimbledon's finals weekend, July 11-12, is approaching fast.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America is now in its thrilling knockout stages, with Round of 16 and Quarter-final matches happening over the next 10 days.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: It's knockout football time! The World Cup 2026 heats up with do-or-die matches. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Big Games Ahead
angles.copy: Every game matters! The FIFA World Cup moves into its intense knockout phase this week. Don't miss a kick!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Returns to Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green will host TRNSMT Festival from July 10-12, 2026, featuring a lineup of rock, indie, and pop acts.

angles.name: Glasgow's Big Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is just one week away! Who are you excited to see at Glasgow Green next weekend?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to TRNSMT is on! Get ready for a huge weekend of live music in Glasgow, July 10-12.

moments.title: Sabrina Carpenter Dominates UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' is still riding high on the UK Official Singles Chart, continuing its reign as one of the summer's biggest hits.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' is still serving up chart success! Is it your summer anthem?

angles.name: Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: Still obsessed with 'Espresso'? Sabrina Carpenter continues to dominate the UK Singles Chart!

moments.title: Happy 58th Birthday, Montell Jordan
moments.blurb: R&B legend Montell Jordan, known for his iconic hit 'This Is How We Do It,' turns 58 today, July 3rd.

angles.name: How We Do It
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 58th birthday to the man behind the anthem, Montell Jordan! 'This Is How We Do It' still goes off.

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Montell Jordan, celebrating his 58th birthday today! A true R&B icon.

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone
moments.blurb: Genre-blending superstar Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday tomorrow, July 4th.

angles.name: Cheers to Posty
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Post Malone turns 31 tomorrow. What's your favourite Posty track?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to Post Malone for tomorrow! From 'White Iverson' to country hits, he does it all.

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, Huey Lewis, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis! The heart of rock and roll is still beating strong.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Do you believe in the Power of Love? Wishing a fantastic 76th birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis on Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Global rap superstar 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) will turn 51 on July 6th.

angles.name: Candy Shop
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent celebrates his 51st on Monday. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Rap Legend
angles.copy: From Queens to worldwide fame, wishing 50 Cent a very happy 51st birthday on July 6th!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th, marked by his annual 'Peace & Love' celebration.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th! Join his annual 'Peace & Love' celebration.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: The legendary Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals?

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, and songwriter Beck, known for his eclectic style, celebrates his 56th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Eclectic Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the incredibly versatile Beck on Wednesday! 'Loser' or 'Where It's At' – what's your pick?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 56th birthday to Beck on July 8th! A true innovator in music.

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, known as the frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the iconic Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 62nd birthday to Courtney Love on July 9th! Rock on!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Steven Tyler
moments.blurb: Aerosmith's legendary frontman, Steven Tyler, will celebrate his 78th birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Demon of Screamin'
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Dream On'! Steven Tyler turns 78 this Sunday. What's your favourite Aerosmith anthem?

angles.name: Rock God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the inimitable Steven Tyler on July 12th!

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, KRS-One
moments.blurb: Influential rapper and hip-hop pioneer KRS-One (Lawrence Parker) celebrates his 61st birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Knowledge Reigns Supreme! Happy 61st birthday to the legendary KRS-One on Sunday!

angles.name: Teacha
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy 61st birthday to 'The Teacha,' KRS-One, this Sunday! A true hip-hop pioneer.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Folk-pop singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Luka, Tom's Diner
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the distinctive voice of Suzanne Vega on Saturday! What's your favourite of her timeless tracks?

angles.name: Folk-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 67th birthday to Suzanne Vega this Saturday!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Arlo Guthrie
moments.blurb: American folk singer-songwriter Arlo Guthrie, son of Woody Guthrie, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Alice's Restaurant
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to folk legend Arlo Guthrie on Friday! 'Alice's Restaurant' is still a classic.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Arlo Guthrie on July 10th!
